recapPrompt.prompt: Which lesson is the best example of a seen-before set problem?

choices.label: Contains Duplicate
choices.feedback: Correct. The whole job is checking whether a value was seen already.

choices.label: Valid Anagram
choices.feedback: Not this one. Valid Anagram needs counts, so it is a map problem.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Explain why Two Sum needs a map instead of only a set.
reflectionPrompt.placeholder: Two Sum needs a map because...

practiceChallenge.title: Mastery check: rebuild the rule
practiceChallenge.description: Complete the helper so it returns the right memory tool without the walkthrough.
hints: Two Sum is a lookup-by-need map problem.
practiceChallenge.successMessage: Pass. You chose the correct memory tool for each chapter pattern.
practiceChallenge.retryMessage: Needs practice. Recheck whether each job needs presence only or extra information.
